ham.subject: Transaction Alert: $200 Debit from ABC Store
ham.body:
Dear John Doe,

We wish to inform you that a $200.00 debit has been processed from your account ending in 1234 at ABC Store on 2026-04-12.

If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact our support team immediately at 1‑800‑123‑4567 or reply to this email.

Thank you for banking with us.

Sincerely,
Your Bank

spam.subject: Urgent: Action Required for Your Scholarship Application
spam.body:
Dear Jane Smith,

Congratulations! Your application for the prestigious Global Scholars Fellowship has been shortlisted.

To secure your scholarship, you must verify your personal information by clicking the link below and complete a short confirmation process. Failure to do so may result in the forfeiture of your award.

<URL>

Please act within 48 hours.

Best regards,
Dr. Alan Thompson
Director, Scholarship Office
